testcase.name: ocrFailureMustStopAutomaticApproval
testcase.system-out:
23:16:58.137 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.erbu.financialcrisis.FinancialCrisisApplicationTests]: FinancialCrisisApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 23:16:58.377 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.erbu.financialcrisis.FinancialCrisisApplication for test class com.erbu.financialcrisis.FinancialCrisisApplicationTests
